case_title: VICTORIA FLORES ROQUE VS. MOHAMED ALI BEN AMEUR et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROQUE, VICTORIA FLORES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AMEUR, MOHAMED ALI BEN AKA BEN AMEUR MOHAMED ALI, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA AL-FANOOSE, DBA AL-FANOUSE INC., DBA AL-FANOOSE MEDITERRANEAN RESTAURANT & CAFE AL-FANOUSE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION $63,797.65 PRINCIPAL, $748.63 INTEREST, $450.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $64,996.28, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROQUE, VICTORIA FLORES AS TO DEFENDANT AMEUR, MOHAMED ALI BEN AKA BEN AMEUR MOHAMED ALI, AN INDIVIDUAL DBA AL-FANOOSE, DBA AL-FANOUSE INC., DBA AL-FANOOSE MEDITERRANEAN RESTAURANT & CAFE AL-FANOUSE, INC., A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
